user_scenarios.steps: Create affiliate → configure system indicators → attach fraud profile → generate API key
Create brand → Add integration → Select template (400+) → Auto-fill connection and lead params
Create Hub → Add affiliate weights → Create flows with GEO/schedule/offer filters → set caps and priorities
Select lead(s) → Массовые операции → Инжект лидов → Choose hub, mode, autologin, proxy → Инжект
UAD Manager → Create scenario → Set lead filter (status=Отказ, GEO=CA) → Configure schedule (interval, timezone) → Enable proxy → Launch
Open lead profile → Основная информация → check fraud score gauge → expand IP/phone/email results → Автологин tab → review device fingerprint
Метрики → Select group-by metric → review KPI tiles → read status group donut → review GEO donut with country table
Телеграм боты → Add bot with Telegram chat ID and username → Настройки бота → select notification events

scorecard.scoring_method: 1-10 per dimension based on observed features vs crypto/forex CRM best practices

lead_management_depth.rationale: 20 bulk operations, 5-tab lead profile, full fraud score with per-field breakdown, device fingerprint, CSV import/export, event history

routing_sophistication.rationale: 3-tier Hub/Flow/Integration routing, weighted round-robin with priority, per-flow GEO/schedule/offer/sub/UTM filters, named GEO groups, backup mode

fraud_detection.rationale: Configurable fraud profiles per affiliate, 4 check dimensions (IP/Email/Phone/Messenger), line-type blocking, real-time toggle, score slider, device fingerprint with WebGL+Canvas hashes

autologin_capability.rationale: 4-stage autologin pipeline, device verification with full fingerprint, own ProRedirect proxy service, anomaly markers, stage-by-stage timestamp logging

automation.rationale: UAD Manager with scenario-based automated resend, interval scheduling, date range, status/GEO lead filtering, continuous mode, proxy integration

analytics_reporting.rationale: Dashboard present with KPI tiles, status group and GEO donuts; however limited to one grouping mode visible, no time-series charts, no affiliate-level analytics dashboard visible

integrations_ecosystem.rationale: 400+ broker templates, own proxy service, Telegram bot native integration with 17 event types, postback system

ux_usability.rationale: Dark theme, consistent sidebar navigation, tabs+panels pattern; dense information per screen; no mobile view; table column customizer is a positive; onboarding complexity appears high

multi_tenancy.rationale: Multi-company support confirmed, 4 account roles; however only visible at company level, not clear on sub-tenant isolation

pricing_value.rationale: $499-$1499/mo flat with no rev-share is transparent and predictable; Starter has meaningful restrictions (lead send limit, new clients only); fraud check caps per tier may be limiting at scale

overall.rationale: Feature-complete crypto/forex CRM with strong routing, fraud, autologin and automation capabilities. Analytics and UX lag slightly. Mature product (v4) with demonstrated real-scale usage.

lead_intake_and_validation.description: Lead capture from affiliate via API (API key required flag per affiliate), phone and email validation toggles, profile validity indicator, CSV import
key_features: Profile validity shown as 'Валидный' badge on lead profile

lead_routing_engine.description: Hub-centric routing with flow-based weighted distribution to brand integrations

entities.Hub: Top-level routing container; has sendable/dedup/backup flags; links affiliates with weights and pricing
entities.Flow: Routing rule inside Hub; points to brand integration; has weight, priority, cap, GEO filter, schedule, offer filter, sub filter, UTM filter
entities.Brand Integration: Connector to broker platform; template-based; has autologin toggle and field mapping

lead_routing_engine.routing_algorithm: Weighted round-robin with strict mode option; priority field for fallback ordering

affiliate_management_module.description: Comprehensive affiliate management with per-affiliate behavioral controls

brand_and_integration_module.description: Broker brand management with template-based integration creation
key_capabilities: Integration templates (400+) auto-fill connection and lead field mapping

fraud_prevention_system.description: Multi-layer fraud prevention: profile-based rules + real-time score check
layers: Layer 1: Per-affiliate fraud profile (IP/Email/Phone/Messenger rule sets with Allow/Block per type)
Layer 2: Real-time fraud score check with max score slider (0-100)
Layer 3: Lead profile fraud score display with per-field breakdown
Layer 4: Device fingerprint in autologin (Bot/VPN/Proxy/TOR detection)
Layer 5: Anomaly flags on lead profile (status anomaly, redirect anomaly)
fraud_prevention_system.phone_line_type_blocking: VOIP blocking specifically highlighted as key use case

autologin_and_proxy.description: Automated broker platform login with device fingerprint verification and own proxy network
pipeline: 4. Device fingerprint captured and verified (Устройство проверено)
anomaly_detection: Device ID uniqueness check (detects shared devices)
autologin_and_proxy.proxy_service: HYPER-1 proxy available for masking autologin origin IP

automated_delivery_module.description: Scenario engine for automated, scheduled, rule-based lead re-injection
use_cases: Resend failed/rejected leads on a schedule
Process leads with specific GEO/status combinations automatically
Distributed delivery with interval (e.g. 30-60 min between batches)
automated_delivery_module.differentiator: Continuous resend mode (Беспрерывная отправка) for perpetual processing of lead pools

notification_system.description: Telegram bot integration for real-time operational alerts

analytics_and_reporting.description: Operational analytics dashboard with KPI summary and geo/status breakdown
capabilities: 6 KPI tiles with counts and percentages
GEO distribution donut chart with per-country table
Per-scenario lead tracking (selected/used tabs in UAD Manager)
gaps_observed: No revenue/cost tracking visible in analytics

status_normalization.description: Mapping layer between raw broker statuses and standardized quality categories
status_normalization.purpose: Enables cross-broker comparison, shave detection, and quality-based routing decisions
status_normalization.shave_detection_mechanism: Аномалия статуса бренда flag triggers when broker reports a previously valid status as invalid — signals broker-side shaving

lead_table_configurability.description: 46-column customizable table for lead list with drag-to-reorder and save
lead_table_configurability.benefit: Adapts to different team workflows (buyers vs support vs admins)

web_enrichment.analyst_summary: HyperOne (ex. Hypernet, founded 2021, rebranded 2023) is the most publicly active competitor in the analysis. Company (11-50 employees, likely bootstrapped) is aggressively entering the international market: active English SEO blog, Telegram channel, Instagram. Pricing at $499-$1499/mo positions it as mid-market. Client testimonials (5 companies, Apr-Jun 2025) praise stability, support speed, and regular updates. Key threats to our product: (1) rich feature set (UAD, 3-layer anti-fraud, ProRedirect, autologin) at competitive prices; (2) active SEO expansion into English-language markets; (3) vertical diversification into Gambling/Nutra reduces crypto/forex dependency. Key weaknesses: no independent reviews on G2/Capterra, low LinkedIn presence, analytics limited vs enterprise solutions.
